content.en:
"It's time to hit the third realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

In the second realm, he was too weak in the 5,000th realm, and he couldn't get a lot of resources, and only after cultivating to break through to the third realm could he make great achievements and save his life.

"Shangyue Realm Lord, I'm ready to ~ impact the third realm!"

Ye Tian and the Moon Realm Lord informed.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you can rest assured to break through!" "The Moon Realm Lord came out of the void in Ye Tian's body, which would not affect Ye Tian's opening up of the extradimensional realm in his body.

Of course, he didn't leave Ye Tian's body, Ye Tian opened up a small space in a cell on his arm, allowing the Moon Realm Lord to temporarily seal his power and live there in seclusion, so that he would not be discovered by the Blazing Sun Palace.

Immediately.

He began to attack the third realm with all his might.

Perfect extra-dimensional Dao species, seven-point extra-dimensional rule realm, he can naturally easily open up the most perfect super-dimensional realm in the body.

And in these years, he has also learned all the experience of opening up the extradimensional realm in his body, and with the guidance of the Lord of the Moon Realm, there will be no problems in the breakthrough process.

"Let's get started!"

The extradimensional rules of the seven-point realm gradually burst out, and small extradimensional realms began to open up in the body in the way of condensing the extradimensional realms in the body.

Countless extra-dimensional rules continued to condense into one point, and at a certain moment, they burst out violently, forming an extreme light.

In an instant, the void in the body gradually distorted, and finally opened up a huge extradimensional realm from one pole.

This extra-dimensional realm was small at first, but after absorbing a large amount of energy from the outside world, there were more and more extra-dimensional realms, and the origin of the extra-dimensional realm in the body continued to grow, and the rules became more and more perfect.

At the same time, Ye Tian's physical body was able to withstand the extradimensional realm, and it was also evolving itself, constantly transforming and improving.

Moreover, the energy in the body is also sublimating, achieving more powerful extra-dimensional energy.

This transformation lasted for a long time, and every moment, his cultivation was improving and skyrocketing, and his strength was also skyrocketing.

About three extradimensional epochs had passed, and Ye Tiancai had finally completed his transformation, stepping from the peak of the second realm to the early stage of the third realm.

And the extra-dimensional realm in the body has also really stabilized, and it is far beyond the extra-dimensional realm in the body of the ordinary third realm, which is the most perfect extra-dimensional realm without a trace of defects.

This kind of extradimensional realm in the body is enough to support him to break through to a higher realm.

"Finally broke through to the third realm!"

Ye Tian felt the strength of his body, he could now kill his past self in seconds, the third realm was far from being comparable to the fourth realm, this was a qualitative change.

After breaking through to the third realm, Ye Tian let the Shangyue Realm Lord re-enter the super-dimensional realm in his body, and the super-dimensional realm in his body was hidden.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, congratulations on your breakthrough to the third realm!"

The Lord of the Moon Realm congratulated.

At this moment, she was also a little envious.

She could see that the super-dimensional realm in the body that Ye Tian had opened up was incomparably perfect, even more perfect and larger than the extra-dimensional realm in the body that she had opened up at the beginning.

What's more, Ye Tian still has a clone, and he has even practiced the Great Realm Armor Technique of the Third Realm, and he is not afraid of the tracking of the Fourth Realm, if he was so demonic at the beginning, he will naturally not be afraid of the Blazing Sun Palace.

It's a pity that she is in the early stage of the ordinary third realm, and now even her cultivation has fallen to the second realm.

However, she cooperated with Ye Tian, and there was still hope for recovery.

"Shangyue Realm Lord, next I need to use your multi-dimensional treasure bottle to condense the multi-dimensional essence of the three realms and use it to improve my cultivation!" Ye Tian said.

"Okay, you hunt down some weaker third-realm extradimensional creatures and hand them over to me first. The Moon Realm Lord said.

"Okay, I'll look for the right target!"

Ye Tian nodded.

......

The super-dimensional creatures of the third realm are not very easy to kill, after all, Ye Tian has just broken through to the early stage of the third realm, and the super-dimensional rule realm is also the seven-point realm, which is not too high, and the combat power is considered ordinary in the third realm.

If you encounter a slightly more powerful third realm, it will be difficult to kill the opponent.

If you want to easily kill the extradimensional realm of the third realm, there is only one way.

Ye Tian decided.

However, the replication body of the third realm cultivation cannot enter the black mist realm, and can only allow the second realm replica body that has been trained to become a black mist multidimensional body to carry some more black mist energy from the black mist realm to supply the third realm of replication body cultivation.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to practice like this.

He had already cultivated the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, and this was his second cultivation, so it was naturally very smooth. []

But in the third realm, he cultivated the black mist multi-dimensional body, and he needed more black mist energy, and naturally took more time.

Time passes.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's black mist multidimensional body was about to be preliminarily practiced.

Rumble!!!!!

His physical body began to transform, and he needed to absorb a large amount of black mist energy, and he was also prepared in advance, and a large amount of black mist energy was released, allowing the replica body of the third realm to absorb it.

After a long time, the replicating body of the third realm completed the transformation of the black mist multidimensional body.

"The replica body of the third realm has been initially cultivated into a black mist multi-dimensional body, only thirty percent of the physical body is damaged, two percent of the super-dimensional Dao species are damaged, and the super-dimensional realm is also slightly damaged, it seems that the degree of damage is better than that of the second realm. Ye Tian said darkly.

After practicing the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, the combat power of his copy body in the third realm skyrocketed, far surpassing before, and he could definitely kill himself who had not practiced the Black Mist Multidimensional Body with one move.

"Yes, let's let this copy body that has been trained into a black mist multi-dimensional body go hunting for the super-dimensional creatures cultivated in the third realm!"

To this end, Ye Tian purchased relevant information.

He won't deal with those third realms with backgrounds, he only looks for those weaker third realms, so that after killing them, he won't cause trouble for himself.

Soon, Ye Tian locked on to the first target, which was a third-level extra-dimensional creature in the 5333rd Territory-Six-Pupiled Gu Snake, the Six-Pupiled Gu Snake clan had many second realms, and there was also a third-realm existence.

Ye Tian's target was the six-pupiled Gu snake of the third realm.

Soon.

Ye Tian infiltrated the territory of the six-pupil Gu snake and sensed the cultivation place of the third-realm six-pupil Gu snake.

At this time, the six-pupiled Gu snake of the third realm was cultivating and comprehending the rules of the extradimensional dimension.

After Ye Tian descended, he was naturally sensed by it.

"Who?"

The aura of the six-pupiled Gu snake surged, and the six pupils locked on Ye Tian, and suddenly sensed a deadly aura from Ye Tian's body.

And Ye Tian didn't talk nonsense, and did it directly.

"Kill!"

The Extra-Dimensional Annihilation Technique was activated, and a devastating light pierced through the Extradimensional Void, killing the Six-Pupiled Gu Snake Eight.
